Project Overview

IntelliHatch is a smart egg incubator project designed for the optimal hatching of Rhode Island eggs through automated climate control and advanced computer-vision-based egg detection.

Educational Purposes Only

This dashboard and the associated smart incubator system were created exclusively for educational and thesis demonstration purposes.

Smart Features

Our system emphasizes three primary stages of AI detection to monitor the incubation process:

1 Embryo Detection

Overview of the initial fertility status to identify viable eggs during the early stages of incubation.

2 Crack & Pipping

Continuous scanning to detect the first signs of shell cracking and pipping as the hatch date approaches.

3 Hatch Chick

Final stage detection identifying the fully emerged chick to log a successful hatching event.
